notableEvents.label: Logan O'Hoppe GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Logan O'Hoppe grounds into a double play, second baseman Ernie Clement to shortstop Andrés Giménez to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Vaughn Grissom out at 2nd. Logan O'Hoppe out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Adam Frazier pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Adam Frazier grounds out, second baseman Ernie Clement to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr.

notableEvents.label: Josh Lowe pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Josh Lowe grounds out, second baseman Ernie Clement to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr.

notableEvents.label: Jo Adell plunked
notableEvents.detail: Blue Jays challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was upheld: Jo Adell hit by pitch. Mike Trout to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jorge Soler plunked
notableEvents.detail: Jorge Soler hit by pitch. Mike Trout to 3rd. Jo Adell to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Yoán Moncada pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Yoán Moncada singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Myles Straw. Mike Trout scores. Jo Adell to 3rd. Jorge Soler to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Nolan Schanuel GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Angels challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: Nolan Schanuel grounds into a double play, second baseman Ernie Clement to shortstop Andrés Giménez to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Yoán Moncada out at 2nd. Nolan Schanuel out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nolan Schanuel rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Angels challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: Nolan Schanuel grounds into a double play, second baseman Ernie Clement to shortstop Andrés Giménez to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Yoán Moncada out at 2nd. Nolan Schanuel out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. grounds into a double play, shortstop Zach Neto to second baseman Vaughn Grissom to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Ernie Clement out at 2nd. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ernie Clement GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ernie Clement grounds into a double play, shortstop Zach Neto to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Nathan Lukes out at 2nd. Ernie Clement out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Myles Straw pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Myles Straw flies out to right fielder Jo Adell.

notableEvents.label: Lenyn Sosa pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Lenyn Sosa doubles (5) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jo Adell. Ernie Clement scores. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. scores.
